zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Woodcock於1241年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登時，她的父親Gilbert Woodcock25歲，母親Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock18歲。她於1259年與Robert de Banastre在英國藍卡爾牛頓 在 馬可費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1291年9月在她的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Woodcock was born in 1241, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert Woodcock, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock, was 18. She married Robert de Banastre in 1259, in Newton in Makerfield, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in September 1291, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Robert de Banastre en 1259, à Newton in Makerfield, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en septembre 1291, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Woodcockが1241年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクウエルデンで生まれた時，父Gilbert Woodcockは25歳，母Mrs. Gilbert Woodcockは18歳であった。1259年にイギリスランカシュアイアニュートン イン マケルフィールドでRobert de Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1291年9月に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Woodcock(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 쿠르든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Woodcock(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 랭카실르 뉴턴 인 마커필드에서 Robert de Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 9월 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Woodcock родилась в 1241 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert Woodcock было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Banastre в 1259 г. в местности нютон ин меикирфиелд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла сентябрь 1291 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.
